mapper.sql: select p.plan_id, p.plan_name, p.term_id, t.term_name, p.plan_type, p.selection_start_time, p.selection_end_time, p.drop_start_time, p.drop_end_time, p.request_start_time, p.request_end_time, p.notice_content, p.rule_content, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark from sc_course_selection_plan p left join sc_school_term t on t.term_id = p.term_id
mapper.delete:
delete from sc_course_selection_plan where plan_id in
#{planId}
